zh.lifeSummary: 當Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton於大約1192年出生在英國林可爾史爾諾可頓時，他的父親Thomas Darcy31歲，母親Joan Marley24歲。他於大約1212年1月8日與Agnes在英國林可爾史爾諾可頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1254年10月16日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾諾可頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton于大约1192年出生在英国林可爾史爾諾可頓时，他的父亲Thomas Darcy31岁，母亲Joan Marley24岁。他于大约1212年1月8日与Agnes在英国林可爾史爾諾可頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1254年10月16日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾諾可頓。

nameMeanings.name: Darcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: Norman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, from nord ‘north’ + man ‘man’, i.e. ‘Norseman’. This name was in use in England before the Conquest, and was reinforced by its use among the Norman invaders themselves. The Normans were the inhabitants of Normandy in northern France, whose name is a reference to the Vikings who took control of the region in the 9th century. In the 11th and 12th centuries they achieved remarkable conquests, including not only Britain but also Sicily, southern Italy, and Antioch. In the Scottish Highlands it is used as the Anglicized equivalent of Tormod .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton was born about 1192, in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Thomas Darcy, was 31 and his mother, Joan Marley, was 24. He married Agnes about 8 January 1212, in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 16 October 1254, in his hometown, and was buried in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton est né environ 1192, à Nocton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Darcy, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Marley, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Agnes environ 8 janvier 1212, à Nocton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 16 octobre 1254, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Nocton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton um 1192 in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Darcy 31 und seine Mutter Joan Marley 24. Er hat um 8. Januar 1212 in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England Agnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 16. Oktober 1254 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton è nato il circa 1192 nel Nocton, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Darcy, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan Marley, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Agnes circa 8 gennaio 1212, nel Nocton, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 16 ottobre 1254, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Nocton, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Norman Darcy Lord of Noctonが約1192年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノクトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Darcyは31歳，母Joan Marleyは24歳であった。約1212年1月8日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノクトンでAgnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1254年10月16日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアノクトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton(이)가 대략 1192년 영국 링코실르 노크턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Darcy(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Marley(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1212년 1월 8일 영국 링코실르 노크턴에서 Agnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1254년 10월 16일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 노크턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton nasceu aproximadamente 1192, em Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Darcy, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan Marley, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes aproximadamente 8 de janeiro de 1212, em Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 16 de outubro de 1254, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton родился около 1192 г. в местности ноктон, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Darcy было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Marley, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes около 8 января 1212 г. в местности ноктон, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 16 октябрь 1254 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности ноктон, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton nació aproximadamente 1192, en Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Darcy, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan Marley, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Agnes aproximadamente 8 de enero de 1212, en Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 16 de octubre de 1254, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
